zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Franceys Fraunceys於1422年5月3日出生在英國素福爾可希加姆時，她的父親Hugh Fraunceys27歲，母親Philippa Hamme47歲。她和THOMAS HIGHAM IV至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1452年3月26日在她的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Franceys Fraunceys于1422年5月3日出生在英国素福爾可希加姆时，她的父亲Hugh Fraunceys27岁，母亲Philippa Hamme47岁。她和THOMAS HIGHAM IV至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1452年3月26日在她的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Franceys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Carlos, Cruz, Gustavo, Amador, Anastacia, Colon, Gaspar, Hiran, Ignacio, Joaquin, Juan.  French Dominique, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Remy, Yves.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Francis  .
Spanish (Francés) and Portuguese (Francês); French (southern) and Catalan (Francès): from an ethnic name meaning ‘Frenchman’ (see Francis ).

variants.name: Francis
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Franceis, modern French François, from Latin Franciscus, originally ‘Frank’, though later used to denote a Frenchman. The personal name owed much of its popularity during the Middle Ages to the fame of Saint Francis of Assisi (1181–1226), whose baptismal name was actually Giovanni but who was nicknamed Francisco because his father was absent in France at the time of his birth. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Francesco and Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Franc , and also their derivatives, e.g. Croatian Francišković (see Francisco 4).
English: ethnic name from the Old French adjective Franceis ‘French’ (see 1 above).
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, or an adoption of the non-Jewish surname.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Franceys Fraunceys was born on 3 May 1422, in Higham, Suffolk, England, her father, Hugh Fraunceys, was 27 and her mother, Philippa Hamme, was 47. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with THOMAS HIGHAM IV. She died on 26 March 1452, in her hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Franceys Fraunceys est née le 3 mai 1422, à Higham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Fraunceys, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Philippa Hamme, avait 47 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec THOMAS HIGHAM IV. Elle est décédée le 26 mars 1452, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Franceys Fraunceys am 3. Mai 1422 in Higham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Fraunceys 27 und ihre Mutter Philippa Hamme 47. Sie hatte mit THOMAS HIGHAM IV mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. März 1452 im Alter von 29 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Franceys Fraunceys è nata il il 3 maggio 1422 nel Higham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Hugh Fraunceys, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Philippa Hamme, aveva 47 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con THOMAS HIGHAM IV. Morì il 26 marzo 1452, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Franceys Fraunceysが1422年5月3日にイギリススフォルクヒガムで生まれた時，父Hugh Fraunceysは27歳，母Philippa Hammeは47歳であった。彼女はTHOMAS HIGHAM IVとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1452年3月26日に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Franceys Fraunceys(이)가 1422년 5월 3일 영국 수폴크 히아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Fraunceys(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Hamme(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 THOMAS HIGHAM IV(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1452년 3월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.3 May 1422–26 March 1452: 3 de maio de 1422–26 de março de 1452
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Franceys Fraunceys nasceu em 3 de maio de 1422, em Higham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Fraunceys, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Hamme, tinha 47 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com THOMAS HIGHAM IV. Ela faleceu em 26 de março de 1452, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Franceys Fraunceys родилась 3 мая 1422 г. в местности хаиам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Fraunceys было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Hamme, 47. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от THOMAS HIGHAM IV. Она умерла 26 марта 1452 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.

es.3 May 1422–26 March 1452: 3 de mayo de 1422–26 de marzo de 1452
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Franceys Fraunceys nació el 3 de mayo de 1422, en Higham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Fraunceys, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Philippa Hamme, tenía 47 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con THOMAS HIGHAM IV. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1452, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años.
